name: p2pbuilders
description: Permissionless peer-to-peer Hacker News for anons who build P2P — now in the browser. No servers, no accounts. Posts are proof-of-work gated and votes are reputation-weighted; boards, threaded comments, follows and subscribable blocklists replicate directly between peers over the same Holepunch gossip engine as peerit. A PearBrowser P2P site.
author: defidon
